conceptualization.theme_description: Explore the lush, dense layers of tropical foliage.

techniques.description: Apply wet paint onto wet paper to create a soft, diffuse look reminiscent of the humidity and mist of a tropical forest.
Layer different shades of greens and blues to mimic the depth and density of the tropical foliage.
Drop in intense pigments of yellow to represent dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.
Use splattering to add texture and represent the chaotic, untamed nature of the undergrowth.

composition.foreground: Dense, overlapping leaves and small, bright flowers using darker greens and occasional bright colors.
composition.middle_ground: Slightly lighter greens with sparser details to suggest depth, highlighting the mid-section of the forest.
composition.background: Use blurred layers of light green and blue to suggest distant foliage and the sky peeking through it.
